mission: To make clean, reliable electric mobility effortless by providing accessible, fast, and trustworthy charging wherever people go.
vision: A future where every journey is powered by renewable energy and charging is as simple as a sunrise.
brand_history: AuroraCharge launched in 2022 with a focus on dependable EV charging in underserved regions. In 2025 the network expanded into urban corridors with fast-charging hubs powered by renewable PPAs.
business_goals: Reach 95% network uptime across all stations
Expand to 2,000 fast-charge locations by end of fiscal year
Maintain NPS of 60+ through improved support and app experience
Match 100% of charging energy with renewable sources by 2027

primary.description: EV owners aged 28-55 who commute daily and take occasional road trips

demographics.regions: Suburban and urban corridors in the US

pain_points: Range anxiety and uncertainty about charger availability

secondary.description: Small fleet operators and rideshare drivers needing predictable charging

competitive_context.differentiation: Transparent uptime reporting, simple pricing, and a human-friendly app UI with reliable station information.

logo.description: A stylized aurora wave forming a subtle lightning bolt within a circle, paired with a clean wordmark.
logo.usage_notes: Use full lockup on light backgrounds; reversed mark on dark backgrounds. Maintain clear space equal to the height of the letter 'A' in the wordmark.

imagery.photography_style: Real people, on-the-go moments, dawn/dusk lighting with natural color grading.
imagery.illustration_style: Minimal line illustrations with soft gradients echoing aurora forms.

design_elements: Bold, clear CTAs with high-contrast buttons

accessibility.wcag_goal: Meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast and interaction standards across web and app surfaces
accessibility.min_contrast_ratio: 4.5:1 for body text; 3:1 for large text
accessibility.notes: Avoid color-only indicators; provide descriptive labels on forms and controls.

voice_summary.tone: Empowering, friendly, and concise. Adjusts to context: instructional in support, inspiring in marketing.

archetype_hypothesis.rationale: Explorer reflects freedom and discovery in electric mobility; Hero emphasizes dependable performance and overcoming range anxiety.
